changes_made.description: Baseline run with original skill (identical to verbose)
Added CRITICAL rules: always write+run Python script, never guess values. Added complete runnable code for both tasks. Emphasized cost formula correctness.
changes_made.economic_dispatch_change: 45 -> 80 (model now runs script instead of guessing)

changes_made.description: Fixed per-unit conversion bug in DC power flow: powers must be divided by BASE_MVA=100 before solving, then flows multiplied back. Strengthened instruction to write .py file first, never write JSON directly.
Final verification run, no skill changes

notes.economic_dispatch_within_limits: The 'within-limits' criterion (weight=0.2) always scores 0 for ALL models due to a task definition bug: the test pattern 'within limits' does not match the test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (the word 'min/max' breaks the contiguous match). The actual test passes with correct values. Maximum achievable score is 80/100.
